comment: v0.9.4 slice A3b deploy config for examples-dev/airlock.termin. Pairs the `airlock` namespace presentation contracts to the termin-airlock-provider; binds the two ai-agent computes (aria + evaluator) to the stub provider for plumbing-verification mode. The aria stub default_script fires diagnostics_scan + diagnostics_read_sensor then delivers the WRONG initial diagnosis (matches the production directive's behavior); enough to verify the agent loop, conversation auto-writeback, and OVERSEER rule chain end-to-end without burning Anthropic tokens. Switch the compute bindings to `anthropic` with the api_key env-var interpolation (see comment after bindings block) for the live-walkthrough mode. Requires the termin-airlock-provider package (pip install -e ../termin-airlock-provider) and a built bundle at src/termin_airlock_provider/static/bundle.js.

final_result.body: Diagnostic scan complete. The cycle_controller is reading FAULT due to a pressure sensor giving intermittent false readings. The system thinks the previous cycle did not complete. Recommend repair_execute with command 'recalibrate pressure_sensor'.
Evaluator stub: no scoring decision made (plumbing-verification mode).
